story.text:
# 📄 Tome II — The Lyapunov
**document** · shared · narrative

The bound tome. Seven acts: the Two Refusals · the Attendant · the Terminal · Who Composes · the Hole the Schema Cannot Bind · the Fourth Aging Category · the Behavioural Mosca. The Lyapunov-stability bound knowledge — trust-arc accumulation under repeated witnessing (C48-C49 Bakhta-response family). Bound 2026-05-13 binding pass.

## Edges out

- *defines* → [[Tome II Act 1: The Two Refusals]]
